summary: Audited the current in-progress and deferred task posture through governed lifecycle/workboard/task-show surfaces. No lifecycle mutation was admissible: 1502 is the current active audit, 1443 is claimed by narada.builder2 without abandonment evidence, and the 11 deferred tasks have explicit parked/blocker posture.

parked on admitted target coordinates and capability evidence

residuals: Task 1443 can become a lifecycle cleanup candidate only with narada.builder2 or Architect abandonment/transfer evidence.
Workboard review obligations are separate from this audit and should be handled by normal Builder duty loop.
